testcase.classname: authenticate middleware rejects request with no Authorization header
testcase.name: authenticate middleware rejects request with no Authorization header

testcase.classname: authenticate middleware rejects non-Bearer Authorization scheme
testcase.name: authenticate middleware rejects non-Bearer Authorization scheme

testcase.classname: authenticate middleware accepts valid JWT and attaches decoded user to request
testcase.name: authenticate middleware accepts valid JWT and attaches decoded user to request

testcase.classname: authenticate middleware rejects a tampered / invalid JWT
testcase.name: authenticate middleware rejects a tampered / invalid JWT

testcase.classname: authenticate middleware rejects an expired JWT
testcase.name: authenticate middleware rejects an expired JWT

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/register 201 — creates user and returns id + email
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/register 201 — creates user and returns id + email

testcase.classname: POST /api/auth/login 200 — returns JWT and user on valid credentials
testcase.name: POST /api/auth/login 200 — returns JWT and user on valid credentials

testcase.classname: GET /api/entries 200 — returns entries belonging to the authenticated user
testcase.name: GET /api/entries 200 — returns entries belonging to the authenticated user

testcase.classname: POST /api/entries 201 — creates entry and returns id + name
testcase.name: POST /api/entries 201 — creates entry and returns id + name

testcase.classname: PUT /api/entries/:id 403 — cannot update another user's entry
testcase.name: PUT /api/entries/:id 403 — cannot update another user's entry

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/entries/:id 403 — cannot delete another user's entry
testcase.name: DELETE /api/entries/:id 403 — cannot delete another user's entry
